description_long: This is an electric guitar with a distinctive V-shaped body, finished in a rich red color with a smooth, glossy surface. The front features two metallic humbucker pickups, a bridge, control knobs, and a selector switch, all mounted on a metallic pickguard. The neck is long and straight, with prominent rectangular inlays on the fretboard and a black headstock fitted with six tuning pegs arranged three on each side. The back of the guitar is clean and unadorned, showing the continuation of the red finish and the V-shaped body. The side views reveal the guitar's slim profile and the protruding hardware on the front. This instrument is designed for performance and is commonly seen in urban music venues, street performances, and garages.
description: A red, V-shaped electric guitar with metallic hardware, a black headstock, and a glossy finish. It features two humbucker pickups and prominent fretboard inlays.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-shaped body, two humbucker pickups, control knobs, selector switch, and detailed fretboard inlays.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's slim profile and the protruding hardware on the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the clean, unadorned red back and the full V-shaped body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and the neck's connection to the body.
attribute_headstock_design: Black, pointed headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo
